testcase.name: test_add_normal
testcase.system-out:
--------------------------------- Captured Out --------------------------------- ====================================================================== TEST SCENARIO: NORMAL for function add ======================================================================
PRECONDITIONS: ✓ Parameter a (int) will be set to 5 ✓ Parameter b (int) will be set to 42
STEP 1: PREPARE TEST DATA ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Step 1.1: Initialize a = 5 Step 1.2: Initialize b = 42 ✓ Test data prepared successfully
EXPECTED RESULT: 47
STEP 2: EXECUTE FUNCTION ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Step 2.1: Call function add(a, b) Step 2.2: Capture return value → result = 47 ✓ Function execution completed
STEP 3: VALIDATE RESULTS ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Step 3.1: Verify return value

STEP 2: EXECUTE FUNCTION ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Step 2.1: Call function reverse_string(str_param) Step 2.2: Capture return value → result = b'' ✓ Function execution completed
STEP 3: VALIDATE RESULTS ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Step 3.1: Verify return value

testcase.name: test_add_normal
testcase.system-out:
--------------------------------- Captured Out --------------------------------- ====================================================================== TEST SCENARIO: NORMAL for function add ======================================================================
PRECONDITIONS: ✓ Parameter a (int) will be set to 5 ✓ Parameter b (int) will be set to 42
STEP 1: PREPARE TEST DATA ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Step 1.1: Initialize a = 5 Step 1.2: Initialize b = 42 ✓ Test data prepared successfully
EXPECTED RESULT: 47
STEP 2: EXECUTE FUNCTION ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Step 2.1: Call function add(a, b) Step 2.2: Capture return value → result = 47 ✓ Function execution completed
STEP 3: VALIDATE RESULTS ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Step 3.1: Verify return value

STEP 2: EXECUTE FUNCTION ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Step 2.1: Call function add(a, b) Step 2.2: Capture return value → result = 0 ✓ Function execution completed

EXPECTED RESULT: -2
